items.title: What UnitedHealth Group (UNH)'s Premium Hikes and Guidance Shift Means For Shareholders
items.description: In recent months, UnitedHealth Group has raised premiums by around 20–30%, updated its 2025 earnings guidance, and faced higher Medicare Advantage utilization, regulatory scrutiny, and leadership changes, while also investing in technology and value-based care programs. Despite these headwinds, improving Reddit retail sentiment, analyst upgrades, and expectations for stronger 2026 earnings suggest investors see the company’s repricing efforts and operational adjustments as the start of a...
